title: PriestConfig
description: Provider and model configuration for a single priest run.

provider.description: Registered provider name. Must match a key in the engine's adapter registry.

model.description: Model identifier passed directly to the provider.

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60.0 if null or omitted.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate. Provider-specific field name (e.g. num_predict for Ollama, max_tokens for OpenAI). Omitted from request if null.

cost_limit.description: Advisory cost ceiling in USD. The engine does NOT enforce this — enforcement is the host application's responsibility.

provider_options.description: Arbitrary key/value pairs merged directly into the provider request payload. Semantics are provider-specific. Examples: {"think": false} for Ollama/Qwen3, {"temperature": 0.7} for any OpenAI-compatible provider. Values may be any JSON type.
